headline: Is Progressive (PGR) Now Attractive After A 24% One-Year Share Price Decline
summary: Wondering if Progressive at around US$200 a share is starting to look attractive, or if the price still runs ahead of the underlying value. The stock's recent performance is mixed, with a 1% decline over the last week, a 0.4% decline over the last month, a 5.4% decline year to date, and a 24.2% decline over the last year, set against a 75.6% return over three years and a 116.2% return over five years. Recent coverage has focused on Progressive as one of the major listed US insurers, with...
